Strategic Transformations B2O · Organizations & Leadership Teams

The Frictionless
Manager Bootcamp

Your managers are not failing. Your structure is.

AI adoption is not a technology problem. It is a people architecture problem. When you deploy AI into a structure that is already strained, you do not reduce friction. You accelerate it.

The Frictionless Manager Bootcamp is a single, intensive 1.5-day experience that equips your middle managers with the diagnostic tools, decision frameworks, and structural clarity they need to lead through AI adoption without burning out, checking out, or collapsing the organizational architecture that must carry the transition.

Book an Executive Briefing Is This Right for Your Organization?

The Bootcamp at a Glance

Format

1.5 days, in-person or virtual

IRL Location

Orlando, FL (additional cities coming soon)

Schedule

Alternating in-person and virtual cohorts

Next Date

September 18-19, 2026 | Orlando, FL | 24 seats | Founding Cohort

Who Attends

Middle managers and their leadership teams

Group Size

Limited to ensure depth of engagement

Outcome

Structural clarity and a 90-day action plan

Pricing is proposal-based and scoped during the Executive Briefing. All engagements begin with a qualifying conversation.

Not sure if the Bootcamp is right for your team?

Take the 3-minute AI Readiness Quiz.

Answer six questions and get a personalized profile that tells you whether the Frictionless Manager Bootcamp fits where your organization actually is right now.

Start the Quiz →
The Real Problem

AI is not the friction. The structure underneath it is.

→

Middle managers are being asked to implement AI tools they were not trained to evaluate.

→

Decision rights are unclear, so every AI-related choice becomes a political negotiation.

→

Your best managers are absorbing the anxiety of their teams, acting as human shock absorbers for structural failures.

→

Role confusion is accelerating. AI is not clarifying who does what. It is exposing what was never clear.

→

Change fatigue is real. Every new tool feels like another demand on people who are already at capacity.

→

Organizations are measuring AI adoption by tool usage, not by whether the structure can actually support the load path.

What the Bootcamp Delivers

From friction to frictionless. In 1.5 days.

The full-day experience is structured to move your team from diagnosis to direction before they leave the room.

01

Structural Strain Diagnosis

Using the UNMASK Framework, we identify where friction is actually coming from in your organization. No assumptions. No guesswork. Real structural data.

02

AI Decision Rights Clarity

Managers leave with a clear map of who decides what when AI is involved. Role confusion is the number one driver of AI adoption failure. We fix the architecture.

03

Load Path Mapping

We identify which managers are carrying invisible overload and redesign how work, accountability, and authority flow through the middle layer of your organization.

04

Human Sustainability Framework

AI adoption that does not account for human capacity will fail. Managers learn to pace transformation around the structure that must carry it.

05

Structural Survival Architecture

The managers most likely to break are the ones absorbing the most friction. This bootcamp directly addresses the structural conditions driving organizational collapse, giving you a framework to survive the human x AI transition.

06

90-Day Action Plan

Every organization leaves with a specific, prioritized 90-day structural action plan built for their context. Not a binder of best practices. A real roadmap.

Who This Is For

This bootcamp is built for organizations that are honest about what is happening.

✓

Mid-sized organizations (50 to 500 employees) in active AI adoption or planning phases

✓

CNOs, COOs, and operational leaders who know their middle managers are strained but cannot yet prove it structurally

✓

Leadership teams where AI tools have been deployed but adoption is uneven, anxious, or stalled

✓

Organizations seeing structural strain concentrate around high-performing managers

✓

Executive teams preparing for a major transformation initiative and want to protect the people layer first

✓

HR leaders who are tired of engagement surveys that name the symptoms but never fix the design

Who This Is Not For

This engagement is not right for every organization.

✗

Organizations looking for a one-day training that checks a compliance box

✗

Leadership teams unwilling to examine the structure, only the people in it

✗

Organizations where the decision-maker is not part of the conversation

✗

Teams seeking a motivational speaker who will affirm rather than diagnose

✗

Those expecting a quick fix for a multi-year systemic problem

A note on fit:

Not every organization is ready for this work, and that is not a judgment. Every engagement begins with an Executive Briefing so we can assess fit, scope, and readiness together before any proposal is created.

Delivery Format

1.5 Days. Two ways to experience it.

The Frictionless Manager Bootcamp alternates between in-person and virtual cohorts so your team can participate in the format that works best for them.

📍

In-Person

Orlando, FL

The full-day bootcamp hosted live in Orlando, Florida. Designed for high-impact, in-room engagement with your leadership team. Additional cities will be added as cohorts grow.

Additional IRL locations coming soon.

💻

Virtual

Live Online Cohort

The same full-day experience delivered virtually. Structured for real engagement, not passive viewing. Includes all diagnostic tools, frameworks, and the 90-day action plan.

Alternates with in-person cohorts throughout the year.

All engagements are proposal-based and scoped during the Executive Briefing. Pricing and available cohort dates are shared at that time.

Ready to reduce the friction
before it costs you your best people?

Every engagement begins with an Executive Briefing. Book a time to talk through what is happening in your organization and whether the Frictionless Manager Bootcamp is the right fit.
